name: adjacent-conflict
description: 1x3 table with conflicting borders between adjacent cells. Cell (0,0) right=single sz=24 red (weight=24). Cell (0,1) left=single sz=4 blue (weight=4), right=double sz=12 green (weight=36). Cell (0,2) left=single sz=8 black (weight=8). Per SS17.4.66 rule 3, higher weight wins at each shared edge.
